title: Senior Doctor - Medtronic India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Medtronic India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Medtronic India in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Medtronic India:
Medtronic India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
